languages.text: "Чему тут радоваться-то?! Правильно Батошски говорит, заберут нас всех и в пушечное мясо определят!"
"What is there to celebrate? Batoshski speaks the truth. They'll take us all and toss us into the grinder as cannon fodder!"
languages.original_text: "Чему тут радоваться-то?! Правильно Батошски говорит, заберут нас всех и в пушечное мясо определят!"

traits.locale_text: "What is there to celebrate?! Batoshski speaks the truth. They'll take us all and toss us into the grinder as cannon fodder!"
"What is there to celebrate?! Batoshski speaks the truth. They'll take us all and toss us into the grinder as cannon fodder!"
"What is there to celebrate? Batoshski speaks the truth. They'll take us all and toss us into the grinder as cannon fodder!"
"What is there to celebrate? Batoshski speaks the truth. They'll take us all and toss us into the grinder as cannon fodder!"

languages.text: “有什么好庆祝的？巴托什斯基说得没错。他们会把咱们全带走，扔进绞肉机里当炮灰！”
languages.original_text: "What is there to celebrate? Batoshski speaks the truth. They'll take us all and toss us into the grinder as cannon fodder!"

traits.locale_text: “有什么好庆祝的？巴托什斯基说得没错。他们会把咱们全带走，扔进绞肉机里当炮灰！”

languages.text: "Kutlanacak ne var? Batoshski doğru söylüyor. Hepimizi alıp yem niyetine kıyma makinesine atacaklar!"
languages.original_text: "What is there to celebrate? Batoshski speaks the truth. They'll take us all and toss us into the grinder as cannon fodder!"

traits.locale_text: "Kutlanacak ne var? Batoshski doğru söylüyor. Hepimizi alıp yem niyetine kıyma makinesine atacaklar!"

languages.text: « Je ne vois pas de raison de se réjouir. Batoshski dit vrai. Ils vont tous nous emmener pour qu'on leur serve de chair à canon ! »
languages.original_text: "What is there to celebrate? Batoshski speaks the truth. They'll take us all and toss us into the grinder as cannon fodder!"

traits.locale_text: « Je ne vois pas de raison de se réjouir. Batoshski dit vrai. Ils vont tous nous emmener pour qu'on leur serve de chair à canon ! »

languages.text: «¿Qué hay que celebrar? Batoshski dice la verdad. ¡Nos van a poner en la línea de tiro como carne de cañón!».
languages.original_text: "What is there to celebrate? Batoshski speaks the truth. They'll take us all and toss us into the grinder as cannon fodder!"

traits.locale_text: «¿Qué hay que celebrar? Batoshski dice la verdad. ¡Nos van a poner en la línea de tiro como carne de cañón!».

languages.text: "Was gibt es da zu feiern? Batoshski sagt die Wahrheit. Sie werden uns alle als Kanonenfutter verheizen!"
languages.original_text: "What is there to celebrate? Batoshski speaks the truth. They'll take us all and toss us into the grinder as cannon fodder!"

traits.locale_text: "Was gibt es da zu feiern? Batoshski sagt die Wahrheit. Sie werden uns alle als Kanonenfutter verheizen!"

languages.text: 「何を祝うんだ？バトシュスキーは真実を語っている。我々全員を捕らえて、砲弾としてミキサーに投げ込むだろう！」
languages.original_text: "What is there to celebrate? Batoshski speaks the truth. They'll take us all and toss us into the grinder as cannon fodder!"

traits.locale_text: 「何を祝うんだ？バトシュスキーは真実を語っている。我々全員を捕らえて、砲弾としてミキサーに投げ込むだろう！」
